mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTR(emp_id, 1,4) as year FROM esg.tb_employees GROUP BY year

select write_year as year , a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.write_dt , a.comp_id , a.orgn_id , (select orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info where orgn_id = a.orgn_id) as orgn_nm , to_char(a.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as created_at , (select hr_nm from esg.tb_hr_info where user_id = a.created_by) as created_by , (select count(*) from esg.tb_employees_detail where write_year = a.write_year and doc_type = a.doc_type and doc_no = a.doc_no) as detail_count , (case when d.signature is not null then 'Y' when c.signature is not null then 'I' when b.signature is not null then 'W' else 'C' end) as approval_status , a.use_yn , b.hr_nm as writer from esg.tb_employees a left join esg.tb_approval_info b on b.target_type = a.doc_type and b.target_id = a.write_year||a.doc_no and b.param = 'writer' left join esg.tb_approval_info c on c.target_type = a.doc_type and c.target_id = a.write_year||a.doc_no and c.param = 'reviewer' left join esg.tb_approval_info d on d.target_type = a.doc_type and d.target_id = a.write_year||a.doc_no and d.param = 'approver' where a.comp_id = #{compId} order by write_year desc, a.use_yn desc, doc_no desc;

select a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.doc_seq , b.write_dt , a.comp_id , a.gubun , b.orgn_id , (select orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info where orgn_id = b.orgn_id) as orgn_nm --, a.stakeholders , (select array_to_string(array_agg(bb.hr_id), ',') from esg.tb_employees_detail_stakeholders aa left join esg.tb_hr_info bb on bb.hr_id = aa.stakeholders where a.write_year = aa.write_year and a.doc_type = aa.doc_type and a.doc_no = aa.doc_no and a.doc_seq = aa.doc_seq) as stakeholders --, (select hr_nm -- from esg.tb_hr_info -- where hr_id = a.stakeholders) as stakeholders_nm , (select array_to_string(array_agg(bb.hr_nm), ',') from esg.tb_employees_detail_stakeholders aa left join esg.tb_hr_info bb on bb.hr_id = aa.stakeholders where a.write_year = aa.write_year and a.doc_type = aa.doc_type and a.doc_no = aa.doc_no and a.doc_seq = aa.doc_seq) as stakeholders_nm , a.requirements , a.obligation , a.risk , a.chance , to_char(a.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as created_at , a.created_by , to_char(a.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updated_at , a.updated_by , a.use_yn , b.use_yn as main_yn from esg.tb_employees_detail a , esg.tb_employees b where a.write_year = b.write_year and a.doc_type = b.doc_type and a.doc_no = b.doc_no and a.comp_id = b.comp_id and a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo} order by a.use_yn desc, a.write_year, a.doc_type, a.doc_no, a.doc_seq, a.created_at;

SELECT tos.write_year, tos.doc_type, tos.doc_no, toi.comp_id, toi.orgn_nm, tos.created_at, tos.created_by, tos.updated_at, tos.updated_by FROM esg.tb_employees tos join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.comp_id = tos.comp_id and toi.orgn_id = tos.orgn_id WHERE tos.comp_id = #{compId} and tos.write_year = #{writeYear} and tos.doc_type = #{docType} and tos.doc_no = #{docNo}

select esg.fn_getsystemcodeminornm('C0004',b.gubun) as gubunNm , (select array_to_string(array_agg(bb.hr_nm), ',') from esg.tb_employees_detail_stakeholders aa left join esg.tb_hr_info bb on bb.hr_id = aa.stakeholders where b.write_year = aa.write_year and b.doc_type = aa.doc_type and b.doc_no = aa.doc_no and b.doc_seq = aa.doc_seq) as stakeholders_nm , b.requirements , b.obligation , b.risk , b.chance from esg.tb_employees_detail b WHERE b.comp_id = #{compId} and b.write_year = #{writeYear} and b.doc_type = #{docType} and b.doc_no = #{docNo} and b.use_yn = 'Y'
